biz.title: Meta rolls out Muse, a new AI image generator
biz.summary: The new image-generating model has numerous use cases, including advertising, decorating and creator-based opportunities.

biz.title: Why the rise of open source AI isn’t hurting Anthropic … yet
biz.summary: Open source models’ success isn’t coming at the expense of frontier labs. Instead, they each seem to capture two phases of the same life cycle.

biz.title: Microsoft joins AI cost-cutting trend by relying more on its own models
biz.summary: Microsoft is the latest Silicon Valley giant to cut back on its AI spending.

biz.title: Discord admits AI moderation bug wrongfully banned users over harmless images
biz.summary: The company confirmed that the issue had been affecting accounts since May, with an additional 200 users banned over the weekend before its team identified and fixed the problem.

biz.title: VC firm Chemistry is raising $500M for its second fund
biz.summary: Chemistry Ventures, the VC firm launched by Bessemer, Index Ventures, and Andreessen Horowitz alums, is raising $500M for its second fund.

biz.title: AI law startup Norm raises $120M, hits unicorn valuation
biz.summary: AI law startup Norm has raised a $120 million Series C round led by Khosla Ventures, valuing the startup at $1.2 billion.

biz.title: This startup pits dealerships against each other to bid on your used car
biz.summary: Bidbus, which lets dealerships bid on used cars, has raised $15 million in a Series A round that was led by early-stage mobility fund Ibex Investors.

biz.title: Savi’s app aims to protect consumers from realistic AI scams like kidnappers demanding ransom
biz.summary: The company just raised $7 million in seed funding, and is launching its app for iPhone and Android on Tuesday.

biz.title: The first American autonomous ground vehicles are fighting in Ukraine
biz.summary: Forterra has deployed more than 100 of its self-driving ATVs in conflict zones in Ukraine.

paper.title: From Fixed to Free Cameras: Calibration-Free View-Robust Vision-Language-Action Model
paper.summary: Real-world robot deployment rarely maintains the training-stage camera setup, where cameras often experience repositioning or remounting depending on actual scenarios. paper.title: Weak-to-Strong Generalization via Direct On-Policy Distillation
paper.summary: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) is a powerful recipe for improving language-model reasoning, but it is expensive to repeat on every new strong model because the target model must generate many rollouts during training. As models scale, post-training itself becomes a bottleneck.

paper.title: Interpretable Human-Label-Free Deep Learning for Real-Bogus Classification with Uncertainty Quantification
paper.summary: Time-domain surveys generate many transient candidates, making Real-Bogus classification a critical step in automated discovery pipelines. paper.title: LLM-as-a-Verifier: A General-Purpose Verification Framework
paper.summary: Scaling pre-training, post-training, and test-time compute have become the central paradigms for improving the capabilities of LLMs. In this work, we identify verification, the ability to determine the correctness of a solution, as a new scaling axis. paper.title: Search Beyond What Can Be Taught: Evolving the Knowledge Boundary in Agentic Visual Generation
paper.summary: Visual generators excel at rendering, but they confidently fabricate what they do not know. paper.title: TabPack: Efficient Hyperparameter Ensembles for Tabular Deep Learning
paper.summary: In deep learning for tabular data, efficient ensembles of multilayer perceptrons (MLPs) have recently emerged as effective and practical architectures. paper.title: CompactionRL: Reinforcement Learning with Context Compaction for Long-Horizon Agents
